texto: Organic farming appealed to me because it involved searching for and discovering nature's pathways, as opposed to the formulaic approach of chemical farming. The appeal of organic farming is boundless; this mountain has no top, this river has no end.
explicacao: Citação de Eliot Coleman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Organic farming appealed to me because it involved searching for and discovering nature's pathway…” articula reflexao, farming, nature em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e nature.

frase_original: Organic farming appealed to me because it involved searching for and discovering nature's pathways, as opposed to the formulaic approach of chemical farming. The appeal of organic farming is boundless; this mountain has no top, this river has no end.

texto: The only truly dependable production technologies are those that are sustainable over the long term. By that very definition, they must avoid erosion, pollution, environmental degradation, and resource waste. Any rational food-production system will emphasize the well-being of the soil-air-water biosphere, the creatures which inhabit it, and the human beings who depend upon it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eliot Coleman sobre temas ligados a saude mental. A afirmação “The only truly dependable production technologies are those that are sustainable over the long te…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, environment, farming, útil em momentos de termino e farming.
